item.purpose: List-item names and the add-item input — the glanceable workhorse.

label.purpose: Chips, member counts, section labels, dialog subtitles.

shadows.name: sheet
shadows.purpose: Modal bottom sheets / dialogs — the only heavy shadow in the system.

shadows.name: honey-lift
shadows.purpose: The login pad-preview card floating on drenched marigold.

shadows.name: dock-whisper
shadows.purpose: White input pill and FAB sitting on the marigold add dock.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: The house easing for every transition and keyframe.

motion.name: strike-fade
motion.purpose: Line-through fades in on checked item labels.

motion.name: sheet-up
motion.purpose: Bottom sheets entering; backdrop fades in 150ms.

motion.name: press
motion.purpose: Tactile compress on every button press.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action on light surfaces — marigold pill with ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.79 0.155 75); color: oklch(0.27 0.025 65); min-height: 2.75rem; padding: 10px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Nunito Sans Variable', 'Nunito Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.68 0.145 68); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.68 0.145 68); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: On-Brand Button
components.description: The inverted twin used on marigold surfaces (header actions, login CTA).
components.css: .ds-btn-ink { background: oklch(0.27 0.025 65); color: oklch(1 0 0); min-height: 2.75rem; padding: 8px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Nunito Sans Variable', 'Nunito Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ink:hover { background: oklch(0.27 0.025 65 / 0.9); } .ds-btn-ink:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.27 0.025 65); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ink:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: The Cancel role — white pill with hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.47 0.03 65); min-height: 2.75rem; padding: 10px 16px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0.015 80); border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Nunito Sans Variable', 'Nunito Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.98 0.005 85); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.68 0.145 68); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard dialog input — white, hairline border, marigold-deep focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.27 0.025 65); width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0.015 80); border-radius: 0.75rem; font-family: 'Nunito Sans Variable', 'Nunito Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.55 0.035 70); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.68 0.145 68); }

components.name: Quantity Chip
components.description: Quantity metadata on an item row.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; background: oklch(0.96 0.04 87); color: oklch(0.40 0.08 68); padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Nunito Sans Variable', 'Nunito Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Item Row
components.description: One rule of the grocery pad: circular checkbox, item name, quantity chip, delete.
components.html: Basil2 bunches
components.css: .ds-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; min-height: 3.25rem; padding: 4px 4px 4px 8px; background: oklch(1 0 0); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0.015 80); font-family: 'Nunito Sans Variable', 'Nunito Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-row-check { min-width: 2.75rem; min-height: 2.75rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; } .ds-row-circle { width: 1.625rem; height: 1.625rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 2px solid oklch(0.55 0.035 70 / 0.9); transition: border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-row-check:hover .ds-row-circle { border-color: oklch(0.68 0.145 68); } .ds-row-name { flex: 1; color: oklch(0.27 0.025 65); font-size: 1.0625rem; text-align: left; } .ds-chip-inline { background: oklch(0.96 0.04 87); color: oklch(0.40 0.08 68); padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-row-del { min-width: 2.75rem; min-height: 2.75rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: none; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; color: oklch(0.55 0.035 70); cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms ease-out, background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-row-del:hover { color: oklch(0.55 0.19 27); background: oklch(0.96 0.025 27); }

components.name: Header Band
components.description: Sticky marigold header with back chevron, title, and one on-brand action.
components.html: Groceries
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: oklch(0.79 0.155 75); padding: 10px 8px; font-family: 'Nunito Sans Variable', 'Nunito Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-header-back { min-width: 2.75rem; min-height: 2.75rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: none; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; color: oklch(0.27 0.025 65); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-header-back:hover { background: oklch(0.68 0.145 68 / 0.25); } .ds-header-title { flex: 1; margin: 0; color: oklch(0.27 0.025 65); font-size: 1.1875rem; font-weight: 700; } .ds-header-action { background: oklch(0.27 0.025 65); color: oklch(1 0 0); min-height: 2.75rem; padding: 8px 20px; margin-right: 8px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; } .ds-header-action:hover { background: oklch(0.27 0.025 65 / 0.9); }

components.name: Add Dock
components.description: The fixed marigold bottom bar: white input pill + ink FAB with marigold plus.
components.css: .ds-dock { display: flex; gap: 8px; background: oklch(0.79 0.155 75); padding: 14px 20px; font-family: 'Nunito Sans Variable', 'Nunito Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-dock-input { flex: 1; min-height: 2.75rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.27 0.025 65); border: none; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 1.0625rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-dock-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.55 0.035 70); } .ds-dock-input:focus { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.27 0.025 65); } .ds-dock-fab { min-width: 2.75rem; min-height: 2.75rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: oklch(0.27 0.025 65); color: oklch(0.79 0.155 75); border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-dock-fab:hover { background: oklch(0.27 0.025 65 / 0.9); } .ds-dock-fab:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-dock-fab:disabled { background: oklch(0.27 0.025 65 / 0.2); color: oklch(1 0 0); }

narrative.overview: ShopMate's visual system is the family grocery pad reborn as software: the marigold warmth of a morning kitchen, the immediacy of a pencil on paper, and the quiet dependability of a system app. The interface is friendly, warm, and familial — a household object that happens to be world-class engineering underneath. Color is committed, not decorative: one saturated marigold carries the login screen, every header band, the add-item dock, and the check affordances, giving the app an unmistakable identity at a glance, even one-handed under supermarket fluorescents. The system explicitly rejects dev-tool darkness and todo-app minimalism; the previous default-Tailwind white+indigo system is retired wholesale.
keyCharacteristics: Committed color: marigold owns headers, the add dock, checks, and the entire login screen
Light, bright, warm — designed for daylight and store lighting; no dark mode
One warm humanist sans (Nunito Sans) across the whole UI, fixed ~1.125-ratio scale
The list is a "pad": one continuous white panel with hairline ruled dividers
Pill-shaped controls, circular checkboxes, ≥44px touch targets everywhere
Responsive motion: tactile feedback and calm transitions, zero page choreography

rules.name: The Committed Rule
rules.body: Marigold is not an accent — it owns real surface area on every screen (header + dock + checks; the login screen is fully drenched). If a grayscale screenshot looks like a generic white app, the color commitment has failed.

rules.name: The Actually-Marigold Rule
rules.body: Warmth is expressed through the saturated brand color, never by tinting neutrals toward cream/beige/sand. Ground stays at chroma ≤0.005; a warm-tinted near-white body background is the failure mode, not the goal.

rules.name: The Daylight Rule
rules.body: Every screen must hold up in a bright supermarket: WCAG AA text contrast everywhere, 3:1 minimum on control outlines (checkbox rings are ink-mute, not line), no low-contrast "elegance."

rules.name: The Dark-Honey Rule
rules.body: Text on marigold is ink or honey-deep — a darker shade of the same hue. Gray or white text on marigold is forbidden.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: One type family everywhere — headings, items, buttons, labels. No display font, ever.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. If a resting card has a shadow, it's wrong; if a floating sheet lacks one, it's wrong.

dos: Do let marigold carry real surface area (The Committed Rule) — header bands, the add dock, check states, and the fully drenched login.
Do make check-off feel like the pencil stroke on a paper grocery pad: drawn checkmark, fading strike, instant optimistic state.
Do keep the calm of Apple Reminders: nothing to learn, nothing to distrust, remote edits appearing in place without ceremony.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion with instant alternatives for every animation, including the checkmark draw and sheet slide.
Do size every touch target ≥44px (min-h-touch/min-w-touch) for one-handed, in-motion use.
Do keep control outlines at ≥3:1 (checkbox rings are ink-mute, never line).
donts: Don't ship "dev-tool darkness" — no dark-terminal aesthetic, no dense engineer-chic panels (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't ship "todo-app minimalism" — no generic gray task-list look; the pad, chips, and cart section are the shopping-list identity (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't tint backgrounds toward cream/beige to fake warmth (The Actually-Marigold Rule) — ground stays at chroma ≤0.005.
Don't put gray or white text on marigold (The Dark-Honey Rule) — use ink or honey-deep.
Don't reintroduce the retired indigo (#4F46E5) or default-Tailwind grays.
Don't render items as individual cards — the pad is one panel with ruled dividers; nested cards are always wrong.
Don't use mascots, vegetable illustrations, or sticker-book decoration — warmth comes from color and interaction, not kitsch.
Don't drop below WCAG AA text contrast anywhere (The Daylight Rule).
Don't define a Tailwind color token without the / <alpha-value> suffix — opacity modifiers silently break without it.
